title: Gemma-4 12B + Hermes,Google AI Edge: EASY, GOOD & LOCAL!
summary: Google released Gemma 4 12B, a local multimodal model for agentic workflows on consumer laptops. It features an encoder-free architecture supporting text, vision, and audio, with multi-token prediction drafters to reduce latency. The model integrates with LiteRT-LM, Ollama, AI Edge Gallery, and agent tools like Hermes.
